case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. ALBERTO TRANSPORT LLC ET AL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALBERTO TRANSPORT LLC $17,398.99 PRINCIPAL, $2,075.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,008.32 INTEREST, $971.65 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,453.96, SEE SCANNED DOC
